# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before 1.9.0 use extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-go
  labels:
    app: hello-world
spec:
  replicas: 2 # tell deployment to run 2 pods matching the template
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hello-world

  template: # create JSON objects by specifying metadata and data for desired in your pod template.
    metadata: 
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        kubernetes.io/config.hash: "f6d894860b529a3680e69b84d44cc2b3"
        prometheus.io/port: 9170
        prometheus.io/scrape: 'true'
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: hello-go
          image: "docker.io/gaiaromanov/hello-go:v3@sha256:b864f6d749529f430e159cc9a0c36e0ee7a370e70a32de366f0ac9f6580173ed"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
